title: Crypto Today: Are BTC, ETH, XRP poised for further gains?
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: BTC, ETH, and XRP show signs of further gains with steady retail demand and increasing institutional interest. Bitcoin surpasses $76,000, and Ethereum nears its
excerpt: BTC, ETH, and XRP show signs of further gains with steady retail demand and increasing institutional interest. Bitcoin surpasses $76,000, and Ethereum nears its 100-day EMA. XRP remains relatively subdued in derivative demand.

content.introduction: BTC, ETH, and XRP show signs of further gains with steady retail demand and increasing institutional interest. Bitcoin surpasses $76,000, and Ethereum nears its 100-day EMA. XRP remains relatively subdued in derivative demand.
body: Turning to XRP, derivative demand remains subdued relative to Bitcoin and Ethereum, with Open Interest averaging just $2.5 billion on Monday.
Bitcoin extends gains above $76,000 as institutional demand for spot ETFs increases. Ethereum presses into the 100-day EMA at $2,352 as
Bitcoin, XRP, and other smaller cryptocurrencies were climbing Wednesday as digital assets continued their strong start to the month after a choppy August.
